2605.19634.title: P2DNav: Panorama-to-Downview Reasoning for Zero-shot Vision-and-Language Navigation
2605.19634.paper_summary: Vision-and-language navigation (VLN) requires an embodied agent to ground natural-language instructions into executable navigation actions in unseen environments. Existing zero-shot methods typically rely on additional waypoint prediction modules, which often entangle high-level directional reasoning with fine-grained local grounding, leading to error-prone and unstable decisions. In this paper, we propose P2DNav, a hierarchical framework for zero-shot vision-and-language navigation. P2DNav consists of three core components: Panorama-to-Downview (P2D), Sliding-Window Dialogue Memory (SDM), and Reflective Reorientation Mechanism (RRM). P2D explicitly decomposes navigation decision-making into two stages: panoramic direction selection and downview local grounding. It first selects the instruction-relevant direction from a 360° panorama, and then predicts a pixel-level target point from the downview RGB observation in that direction. In addition, SDM organizes navigation history as a multi-turn dialogue context and maintains recent visual observations within a sliding window to support long-horizon navigation. RRM further enables reflective reorientation by assessing the reliability of local grounding based on the downview observation and returning to panoramic direction selection when necessary. Experiments on the R2R-CE benchmark show that P2DNav achieves strong performance among zero-shot methods. In particular, compared with the state-of-the-art (SOTA) zero-shot waypoint-based and waypoint-free methods, P2DNav achieves SR gains of 146.6% and 58.9%, respectively, demonstrating the effectiveness of P2D, SDM, and RRM for zero-shot VLN. Code will be released for public use.
2605.19634.paper_summary_zh: 視覺與語言導航（VLN）需要一個具體化的代理人將自然語言指令轉化為可執行的導航行動，並在未見過的環境中進行操作。現有的零樣本方法通常依賴額外的路徑點預測模塊，這往往將高層次的方向推理與精細的本地基準混合在一起，導致易出錯且不穩定的決策。在本文中，我們提出了P2DNav，一個用於零樣本視覺與語言導航的分層框架。P2DNav由三個核心組件組成：全景到下視圖（P2D）、滑動窗口對話記憶（SDM）和反思性重新定向機制（RRM）。P2D明確將導航決策分解為兩個階段：全景方向選擇和下視圖本地基準。它首先從360°全景中選擇與指令相關的方向，然後從該方向的下視RGB觀察中預測一個像素級的目標點。此外，SDM將導航歷史組織為多輪對話上下文，並在滑動窗口內維護最近的視覺觀察，以支持長距離導航。RRM進一步通過根據下視觀察評估本地基準的可靠性來實現反思性重新定向，並在必要時返回全景方向選擇。在R2R-CE基準上的實驗顯示，P2DNav在零樣本方法中表現出色。特別是，與最先進的（SOTA）零樣本基於路徑點和無路徑點的方法相比，P2DNav分別實現了146.6%和58.9%的SR增益，證明了P2D、SDM和RRM在零樣本VLN中的有效性。代碼將會公開釋出供公眾使用。
2605.19634.author: Kai Sheng et.al.
2605.19634.authors: Kai Sheng, Liuyi Wang, Haojie Dai, Jinlong Li, Yongrui Qin, Zongtao He, Chengju Liu, Qijun Chen
